inline_comments.message:
The current input name in oom tree is k8s-datafile-collector-input --> https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/charts/dcae-bootstrap/resources/inputs/k8s-datafile-collector-input.yaml

Changing to plural will break the deployment. As this is cosmetic change, will suggest to modify this post R3 as it involves more than one project repo update.
